title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to Tenant to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Support > App section does not clear Tenant name and Tenant ID when switching from a Tenant-linked account to a non-Tenant account
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Log in with an account that is linked to Tenant A.
4. Verify that Tenant A information (Tenant name and Tenant ID) is displayed correctly.
6. Log in with an account that is not linked to any Tenant.
8. Verify that the account information is displayed.
9. Verify that the Tenant name and Tenant ID fields are not present.
expected: After logging in with an account linked to Tenant A, Tenant A info (name and ID) is displayed in Support → App. After logging in with an account not linked to any Tenant, account information is displayed but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present.
